SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS KEITH KESSLER, CHRISTOPHER PENKSA, AND JOHN P. MCCORMACK. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS DEAN NG AND WENDY NG. KEITH KESSLER MAKES DISCLOSURE RE: HIS PREVIOUS AFFILLIATION WITH LAW FIRM WHERE HE WORKED AFTER JUDGE ROBERTSON HAD LEFT THE FIRM. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OBJECT TO JUDGE ROBERTSON HEARING THE MATTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II,, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KESSLER, KEITH PENKSA, CHRISTOPHER MCCORMACK, JOHN P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, DEAN NG, WENDY $4,207.58 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,312.58, DEAN AND WENDY NG JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY ALL THREE PLAINTIFFS A TOTAL OF $4,207.58. THE PAYMENT OF $4207.58 SHALL BE DIVIDED EQUALLY BETWEEN THE THREE PLAINTIFFS, KEITH KESSLER, CHRISTOPHER PENKSA AND JOHN MCCORMACK, UNLESS PLAINTIFFS AGREE TO A DIFFERENT DISTRIBUTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
